title: 07 Days Danakil Depression Tours
html:
Danakil Depression Tours

Mode of Transport: Surface and flight

Duration: 07 Days / 06 Nights

Day 01: Arrival in Addis Ababa & Sightseeing

Arrive in Addis Ababa and transfer to your hotel. Depending on your arrival time, enjoy a sightseeing tour of Addis Ababa, exploring the city’s vibrant culture and history.

Day 02: Fly to Mekele & Drive to Hamedela (Begin Danakil Desert Tour)

 After an early breakfast, transfer to the airport for a flight to Mekele. Upon arrival, meet your vehicle and guide and embark on a scenic drive to Hamedela. Enjoy a picnic lunch in Berhale while arranging necessary permits and police escort. Continue to Hamedela, where you will camp for two nights. Along the way, admire the local villages of the Tigre and Afar tribes, and witness camel caravans transporting salt bars to nearby towns.
Overnight: Camping in Hamedela

Day 03: Hamedela to Dodome to Erta Ale

 In the morning, drive to Dodome, where camels will be arranged for the ascent, along with a local militia and rock guide. For those who wish to ride, camels will be available. In the late afternoon, begin a 3 hour trek to the summit of Erta Ale volcano. At 613 meters, Erta Ale is one of only five volcanoes in the world with a continuous lava lake, which has existed since the early 20th century.
Overnight: Camping at the summit of Erta Ale

Day 04: Sunrise at Erta Ale & Return to Hamedela

Rise early to witness the stunning sunrise over the Erta Ale volcano rim. Afterward, drive back to Hamedela, where you will visit a camel caravan in the late afternoon.
Overnight: Camping in Hamedela

Day 05: Dallol Sulphur Springs, Lake Assale, & Camel Caravans

 Embark on an excursion to Dallol, situated 116 meters below sea level, one of the lowest places on Earth. Explore the colorful salt mining area and visit Lake Assale, where you’ll follow the camel caravans and walk with the Afar people. You’ll learn about their traditional methods of salt extraction, which was once used as local currency, and observe how they prepare their traditional bread, communicate, and travel.
Return to Hamedela for the night. Overnight: Camping in Hamedela

Day 06: Hamedela  to Mekele

 Drive back to Mekele, passing through Berhale and the River Bed. Ascend to the Tigrian highlands and stop for photographs of the dramatic Danakil Depression.
Overnight: Hotel in Mekele

Day 07: Fly Back to Addis Ababa

In the morning, fly back to Addis Ababa. In the evening, enjoy a farewell dinner at one of the best traditional Ethiopian restaurants, where you can taste a variety of local dishes and enjoy folkloric dances. Afterward, transfer to the airport for your departure.
